raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un fadedsinaja ta KUNGA
Namnu/ un ta Kehnina Nam-
mu/ un wiſſus Jerusalemes
Nammus/ ir wiſſus leelns Nam-
mus fadedsinaja winſch ar Ug-
guni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un wiſſ Kaldeēru
Spehks/ kas pee to Pils Karra-
Wihrn Wirfneeku bija/ nolausti-
ja tohs Jerusalemes Muhrus
apkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tohs atlizziſchus Can-
dis/ kas Pilsfahta bija atlizzi-
nati/ un tohs Atkahpajus/ kas
pee to Babeles Kehninu pahr-
gahjuschi/ un to zittu Draudsi-
bu aiswedde NebusarAdans tas
Pils Karra-Wihru Wirfneeks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Bet no teem Semmes
Laudim atlizzinaja tas Pils-
Karra-Wihru Wirfneeks zittus
par Wihrn-Dahrsneekteem un
Arraiecul.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un tee Kaldeēri falausi-
ja tohs Warra Stabbus/ kas ta
KUNGA Namnā bija/ un tohs
Skrahgus/ un to Warra Juh-
ru/ kas ta KUNGA Namnā
bija/ un nowedde to Watru tes
Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Tee nehme arridsan tohs
Pohdus un Lahpfstas/ un Dak-
fhus/ un Rivehpja-Trankus/ un
wiſſus Warra Rihkus/ ar ko tas
Darbs tappe padarriths.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Un tas Pils Karra-Wihru
Wirfneeks nenehme tayś Pan-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Tohs diwi Stabbus
iveenu Juheu/ un tohs St-
gus/ ko Salamans preekfe-
KUNGA Namna bij dar-
Wiffu scho Tranku Warth-
bija fiwerrams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Weens Stabs bija af-
padeſminis Obieſchu augsts/
winnā Pohga us ko btja no Wi-
ra/ un ta Pohga bija trihs
lektā augsta/ in tahs Stib-
un Granat-Ahboti apkahrt
Pohgn bija viſſi no Warra.
tā patt btja erri tas ohtrs Sta-
ar tahin Stibpahm-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un tas Pils Karra.Wi-
Wirfneeks nehme Seraju t-
pirmas lahrtas Preesteri/
Zetrantije tahs ohtras Kabr-
Preesteri/ un trihs Sleeg-
Sargus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Un no Pilsfahta neh-
wiſsch weennu Kambar-Junku
kas vahr teem Karra-Wihre-
bija eezelts/ un peezus Wihr-
no teem/ kas allaschia preekfe-
Kehninu bija/ un Pilsfahta
rasti tappe/ un Soweru to Ra-
ra Leel-Kungu/ kas tohs Se-
mes Laudis us Karra ribkoja/
feschdefurits Wihrus no tee-
Semmes Laudim/ kas Pilsfa-
tā atrasti tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Un NebusarAdans t-
Pils Karra-Wihru Wirfnee-
tohs nehmis/nowedde tohs pee-
Babeles Kehninu us Riblatu-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Un tas Babeles Kehnin-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
